title: Happy Ghast old pixel resolution x Fresh Animations
description: makes the ghast and happy ghast have the old pixel resolution 16x16 of the ghast from before 1.21.6, rather than the new resolution 32x32, and works with Fresh Animations.
body:
Reverts the Ghast's texture to its old 16x16 pixel resolution and makes the Happy Ghast have its own 16x16 texture, but works with Fresh Animations' new 1.10.0 update. 

Of course, you do need fresh animations for this to work.
________________________________________________________
# Fresh Animations
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations/version/1.10.0
